sum: This mini-mod petrifies Imoen during combat on the Waukeen's Promenade. The idea is to ease the NPC's conscience in order to complete all the quests in Chapter 2, bearing in mind that Imoen doesn't...
no: Mini-mod: petrifies Imoen during the Promenade combat so players can complete Chapter 2 quests without her. v1.0, English only, jastey.

co.n: Imoen gets turned to stone in Promenade fight
co.tp2n: Imoen gets turned to stone in Promenade fight
